title: Add Move button to menu recipe rows (web + mobile)
description: Add a Move button to each recipe row in menu detail view that opens a course selector (popover on web, bottom sheet on mobile) to change the recipe's course assignment

stories.title: Add Move button to web menu recipe rows
acceptanceCriteria: Move button appears on each recipe row in apps/web/app/dashboard/menus/[id]/page.tsx
Button shows between the recipe info and the remove (X) button
Button uses icon (arrows or move icon) + 'Move' label
Button has hover state matching ChefsBook theme (cb-primary on hover)
Clicking Move button opens a popover anchored to the button

stories.title: Create course selector popover component (web)
acceptanceCriteria: Popover component created (can be inline or separate file in apps/web/components/)
Shows all 9 course options from COURSE_ORDER: starter, soup, salad, main, side, cheese, dessert, drink, other
Current course is greyed out (disabled, lower opacity, or visual indicator)
Each course is a clickable button/option with clear hover state
Clicking outside popover or pressing Escape closes it without changes
Popover uses ChefsDialog or similar modal pattern for consistency

stories.title: Wire up course change on web
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a course option calls updateMenuItem(itemId, { course: newCourse }) from @chefsbook/db
Popover closes immediately after selection
Menu view refreshes to show recipe in new course section (calls loadMenu())
Recipe appears in correct alphabetical/sort order in new course section
Error handling: if update fails, show error message and keep popover open or show alert

stories.title: Add Move button to mobile menu recipe rows
acceptanceCriteria: Move button appears on each recipe row in apps/mobile/app/menu/[id].tsx
Button is TouchableOpacity with icon (Ionicons arrow or move icon)
Button positioned between recipe info and remove button
Button uses theme colors from useTheme().colors
Tapping Move button opens bottom sheet with course selector

stories.title: Create course selector bottom sheet (mobile)
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom sheet Modal created following mobile patterns (see existing modals in file)
Shows all 9 courses from COURSE_ORDER with COURSE_LABELS for display names
Current course is visually disabled (greyed out, lower opacity, or checkmark + disabled)
Each course option is TouchableOpacity with clear press feedback
Sheet uses useSafeAreaInsets() for paddingBottom (ui-guardian.md rule)
Tapping outside or drag-down gesture closes sheet without changes

stories.title: Wire up course change on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a course calls updateMenuItem from @chefsbook/db via menuStore action or direct call
Bottom sheet closes immediately after selection
Menu refreshes via fetchMenu(id) to show recipe in new course section
Success toast shows confirmation (e.g. 'Moved to Starter')
Error handling: if update fails, show Alert with error message

stories.title: Add i18n keys for Move button (all 5 locales)
acceptanceCriteria: Key menus.moveRecipe added to all 5 locale files: en.json, fr.json, es.json, it.json, de.json in apps/web/locales/
Key menus.moveRecipe added to all 5 locale files in apps/mobile/locales/
Key menus.movedTo added (for success toast: 'Moved to {course}')
Key menus.selectCourse added (for bottom sheet title: 'Select course')
All translations are accurate and natural for each language

stories.title: Type check both apps
acceptanceCriteria: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors
cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors
No new TypeScript errors introduced by changes
updateMenuItem type signature from @chefsbook/db is used correctly
MenuCourse type is imported and used correctly for course parameter
